_comment: Recorded LLM adjudications for the offline backfill leg. Keys are sha256 of the R4-bounded request payload (test_path + test_title + candidate_frs). Responses carry auto_write=false: an LLM-alone/title-similarity verdict is advisory and may NOT auto-write (only explicit-tag/exact-split corroboration may).

response.rationale: title describes order persistence; matches FR-03.03 wording

payload.test_title: copies the launch command to the clipboard

response.rationale: no live FR matches; candidate for orphan review, not a stale-feature accusation
